feedback_files.tests/test_reconnect_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def test_late_reconnect_batch_does_not_regress_the_visible_head():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    db.executescript((ROOT / "sql/001_schema.sql").read_text())
    db.executescript((ROOT / "sql/002_head_triggers.sql").read_text())
    db.execute("INSERT INTO documents VALUES ('guide', 'Guide')")
    db.executemany(
        """INSERT INTO document_versions
           (document_id, version_id, logical_clock, body, import_batch)
           VALUES ('guide', ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
        [
            ("g-4", 4, "initial", "online-1"),
            ("g-10", 10, "approved", "online-2"),
            ("g-6", 6, "delayed offline edit", "reconnect-old"),
        ],
    )

    stored_head = db.execute(
        "SELECT version_id, logical_clock FROM document_heads WHERE document_id = 'guide'"
    ).fetchone()
    assert tuple(stored_head) == ("g-10", 10)

    visible = db.execute((ROOT / "sql/read_current.sql").read_text()).fetchone()
    assert visible["version_id"] == "g-10"
    assert visible["body"] == "approved"
    assert visible["logical_clock"] == 10
